headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co secures $250M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $250M contract with a global retailer provides a substantial and reliable revenue boost for Jorval Trading Co.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
